title: Toppr Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Toppr Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Toppr Capital India in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Toppr Capital India:
Toppr Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Toppr Capital India!
